source_status_rows.role_for_customer_shortlist: token identity / symbol / chain candidate base
pair identity / dex route / chain pair base
latest liquidity and safe liquidity guard
latest price, tx, volume, price change guard
later news confidence hook, not mandatory for first binding
later explainability hook, not mandatory for first binding
later AI outcome calibration hook, not live binding source now
must stay zero; display active simulated positions later
later paper plan source, not customer shortlist now

position_state: READY_MANUAL only if all hard guards pass
VUR_KAC only if TP1-only fast exit guard passes
risk_badge: Düşük Risk / Orta Risk / Yüksek Risk / Küçük Miktar / Veri Eksik
safe_entry_amount_usd: hard cap by risk band and liquidity
tp2_price: optional, blank for Vur Kaç TP1-only
tp3_price: optional, blank for Vur Kaç TP1-only
pilot_mode: auto pilot disabled until later approval

plan_rows.name: READ_CANONICAL_TOKEN_PAIR_BASE
plan_rows.purpose: Read tokens and pairs from live DB in read-only mode.
block_if: token/pair identity cannot be joined safely

plan_rows.name: READ_LATEST_MARKET_LIQUIDITY_SNAPSHOTS
plan_rows.purpose: Find latest usable liquidity/market snapshots per pair/token.

plan_rows.name: COMPUTE_CUSTOMER_SHORTLIST_CLASS
plan_rows.purpose: Classify as Yıldız Adayı, Vur Kaç, or İzleme.
rules: Yıldız Adayı: liquidity/volume/tx/freshness balanced, risk not high
Vur Kaç: short-term volume/tx opportunity, TP1-only, small amount
İzleme: missing/weak/stale data or hard block

plan_rows.name: APPLY_RISK29_POSITION_SIZING
plan_rows.purpose: Calculate safe amount, max safe buy, SL, TP1/TP2/TP3.
rules: high risk forces very small amount

plan_rows.name: BUILD_CUSTOMER_VISIBLE_JSON_STAGING
plan_rows.purpose: Generate customer_shortlist_real_staging.json in isolated preview/staging path only in next dry-run.

plan_rows.name: CUSTOMER_UI_BINDING_RECHECK
plan_rows.purpose: Re-use 8100 preview with real staging JSON and verify no internal leaks.
quality_rules: NEDEN LİSTEDE? must stay clean Turkish
No real buy button in customer shortlist binding.
No active panel apply in DATA42.
If data is missing, row becomes İzleme/Bekle/$0.
Vur Kaç is TP1-only and small amount.
Core Lab may annotate only; Core Lab cannot open trade or override trade.
Customer JSON must hide token_uid, pair_uid, raw source URL, debug score.
Binding output must be isolated staging first.
Active panel apply requires separate apply-plan and explicit approval.
Any integrity/FK/paper runtime issue blocks binding.
